description: Legal fragment (lower left corner). Mainly in Hebrew and Aramaic, with Judaeo-Arabic for specific terms. Includes a list of the items of the trousseau of someone's wife Sitt al-[...]. Also mentions her son Saʿd. The name ha-Sar Rav Netanʾel appears at the bottom. Details of the case are unclear without a join.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
